name: io.github.semiotronika/linza-mcp
title: LINZA
description: Local-first MCP sidecar for agent workspaces, artifacts, review cards, supervised knowledge growth, and context export.

environmentVariables.name: LINZA_VAULT
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the Markdown workspace or vault LINZA may index.

environmentVariables.name: LINZA_EMBED_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Embedding provider: hash for offline startup, openai for OpenAI-compatible APIs, or ollama.

environmentVariables.name: LINZA_EMBED_URL
environmentVariables.description: Embedding API base URL when LINZA_EMBED_PROVIDER is openai or ollama.

environmentVariables.name: LINZA_EMBED_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Embedding model name or hash dimension.

environmentVariables.name: LINZA_DEFAULT_PROFILE
environmentVariables.description: Default search profile name. Defaults to general.

environmentVariables.name: LINZA_TOOL_SURFACE
environmentVariables.description: Tool surface: default for the compact public workflow or advanced for development.
